zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan於1358年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾拉格藍時，她的父親John Blouet26歲，母親Catrin Verch Gwrgan33歲。她於1394年之前與Sir James Berkeley在威爾士蒙姆爾拉格藍結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1420年在威爾士蒙姆爾拉格藍享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan于1358年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾拉格藍时，她的父亲John Blouet26岁，母亲Catrin Verch Gwrgan33岁。她于1394年之前与Sir James Berkeley在威尔士蒙姆爾拉格藍结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1420年在威尔士蒙姆爾拉格藍享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bluet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German and Swiss German: nickname for a youthful person, from Middle High German bluost ‘blossom, flower’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan was born in 1358, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, John Blouet, was 26 and her mother, Catrin Verch Gwrgan, was 33. She married Sir James Berkeley before 1394, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1420, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan est née en 1358, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Blouet, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Catrin Verch Gwrgan, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Berkeley avant 1394, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan 1358 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Blouet 26 und ihre Mutter Catrin Verch Gwrgan 33. Sie hat vor 1394 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales Sir James Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1420 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan è nata il nel 1358 nel Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Blouet, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Catrin Verch Gwrgan, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Berkeley prima del 1394, nel Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1420, nel Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglanが1358年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで生まれた時，父John Blouetは26歳，母Catrin Verch Gwrganは33歳であった。1394年以前にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランでSir James Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1420年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan(이)가 1358년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Blouet(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catrin Verch Gwrgan(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1394년 이전 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 Sir James Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan родилась в 1358 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Blouet было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Catrin Verch Gwrgan, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Berkeley перед 1394 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan nació en 1358, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, John Blouet, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Catrin Verch Gwrgan, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir James Berkeley antes de 1394, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1420, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 62 años.
